title: Quiz: Do You Know What Happens BEFORE a GDP Reversal? 📊
description: Most traders get destroyed on GDP release day. But smart money leaves clues BEFORE the candle drops. Can you spot them? Test your ICT knowledge with R2F Trading — the system that's coached traders for 10+ years. Follow for daily setups. r2ftrading.com
script: GDP drops tomorrow. 83% of retail traders get it WRONG. Do YOU know what price does first? Before a GDP reversal, smart money does ONE thing. What is it? A) Breaks structure. B) Sweeps liquidity. C) Fills the FVG. Most people pick A. Feels obvious. Structure breaks and you chase. That's the trap. The answer is B. Liquidity sweep. Smart money hunts your stops BEFORE the real move. On Wednesday GDP weeks, price sweeps a key high or low first — THEN reverses hard. Every. Single. Time. Tomorrow: watch for the sweep. Wait for the FVG fill after. THEN enter. That's the R2F Trading system. Follow R2F Trading. We post setups like this every single day. r2ftrading.com — link in bio.
